section.div: Tesseract Open Source OCR Engine (main repository)
Claude Code template for Spring Boot and other staff (included in the tags)
wazero: the zero dependency WebAssembly runtime for Go developers

A WASM plugin execution engine. Upload any WASM binary as a plugin, then invoke it via REST API with JSON payloads. Every plugin runs in an isolated sandbox with memory limits and timeouts — no plugin can crash or block the server.
